list.name: Changes
list.comment:
Initial release: McCabe-Thiele distillation diagram generator
- Interactive Streamlit app for binary distillation analysis - Equilibrium curve from constant alpha or uploaded VLE data - McCabe-Thiele stepping algorithm with feed tray identification - Fenske minimum stages and Kirkbride feed tray location - Minimum reflux calculation and visual reference line - Total/partial condenser and reboiler stage credit handling

task.summary:
Initial release: McCabe-Thiele distillation diagram generator
- Interactive Streamlit app for binary distillation analysis - Equilibrium curve from constant alpha or uploaded VLE data - McCabe-Thiele stepping algorithm with feed tray identification - Fenske minimum stages and Kirkbride feed tray location - Minimum reflux calculation and visual reference line - Total/partial condenser and reboiler stage credit handling

Initial release: McCabe-Thiele distillation diagram generator
- Interactive Streamlit app for binary distillation analysis - Equilibrium curve from constant alpha or uploaded VLE data - McCabe-Thiele stepping algorithm with feed tray identification - Fenske minimum stages and Kirkbride feed tray location - Minimum reflux calculation and visual reference line - Total/partial condenser and reboiler stage credit handling

MESSAGE.value:
Initial release: McCabe-Thiele distillation diagram generator
- Interactive Streamlit app for binary distillation analysis - Equilibrium curve from constant alpha or uploaded VLE data - McCabe-Thiele stepping algorithm with feed tray identification - Fenske minimum stages and Kirkbride feed tray location - Minimum reflux calculation and visual reference line - Total/partial condenser and reboiler stage credit handling

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
Initial release: McCabe-Thiele distillation diagram generator
- Interactive Streamlit app for binary distillation analysis - Equilibrium curve from constant alpha or uploaded VLE data - McCabe-Thiele stepping algorithm with feed tray identification - Fenske minimum stages and Kirkbride feed tray location - Minimum reflux calculation and visual reference line - Total/partial condenser and reboiler stage credit handling
